description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for integration tests with Home Assistant. The workflow should trigger on pull requests to main and dev branches, on push to these branches, and on a daily schedule at 2 AM UTC. It should initialize test versions, then for each version and with/without integration, set up .NET 5, build the code, download and set up Home Assistant, and run integration tests. If tests fail, it should collect Home Assistant logs and send a Discord notification on scheduled runs.
